zh-CN.body: 题项和报告维度已有内容映射，但需要持续专家复核和用户反馈。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 证据状态透明不是削弱产品，而是防止过度解释。
zh-CN.what_this_means_for_user: 你可以把结果用于自我理解、沟通反思和成长计划，但不应用于高风险决策。
zh-CN.next_validation_step: 后续应通过样本扩展、复测稳定性、用户反馈和专家复核持续验证。

en.body: Items and report dimensions have content mapping, with ongoing need for expert review and user feedback.
en.do_not_overread: Transparent evidence status strengthens proper interpretation.
en.what_this_means_for_user: Use the result for self-understanding, communication reflection, and growth planning, not high-risk decisions.
en.next_validation_step: Next validation should include larger samples, retest stability, user feedback, and expert review.
